news.headline: Some wealthy Asians look to move Dubai assets closer to home on Iran war fears
news.summary:
<p>Soon after the first Iranian missile and drone <a href="https://www.dawn.com/news/1977076">attacks on Dubai</a> last week, two Indian entrepreneurs based there tried to move more than $100,000 each from their local bank accounts to Singapore to hedge risk.</p>
